ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a premium 4-bedroom villa boasting a highly desirable direct lake view and situated on one of the largest plots (9,760 sqft) in its actual location. risk_flags: Critical Location Mismatch: The property is categorized under 'Emirates Hills' but is actually located in 'Jumeirah Park'. This distorts the market median comparison (AED 2,936/sqft for Emirates Hills vs. typically lower rates in Jumeirah Park).

title: Type 12 | Largest 4 Bedroom Layout | Upgraded
description: Century 21 Set within the popular Meadows 2 community, this Type 12 villa offers a well-proportioned layout with&nb

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is a Type 12 villa, which is highly regarded as one of the largest and most versatile 4-bedroom layouts within the Emirates Living master development. While listed under 'Emirates Hills', the description clarifies its actual location as 'Meadows 2'. The Meadows is a premium, mature, and highly sought-after family community by Emaar, featuring established greenery, lakes, and community centers. The 'upgraded' status adds significant value, as original Meadows finishes (dating back to the mid-2000s) are typically dated. However, the quality of these upgrades must be physically verified.
risk_flags: Location Mismatch: The listing is categorized under 'Emirates Hills' but the description specifies 'Meadows 2'. This is a common broker tactic to artificially inflate search exposure.

Misleading Price Comparison: The 'Market Median' of AED 2,861/sqft reflects ultra-luxury Emirates Hills pricing. Comparing this villa's AED 1,883/sqft to that median creates a false impression of a massive discount. In reality, AED 1,883/sqft is a standard-to-premium rate for an upgraded Meadows villa.

Capital Expenditure (CapEx) Risk: As an older Emaar community, properties in The Meadows often suffer from aging MEP (mechanical, electrical, plumbing) systems and structural wear. If the 'upgrades' are cosmetic only, the buyer faces latent maintenance risks.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: At AED 1,883 per sqft (totaling approx. AED 10.95M), this property represents a stable, high-demand asset for end-users and premium tenant demographics in the Emirates Living area. However, investors must disregard the apparent 34% discount to the 'Emirates Hills' market median, as this is a Meadows asset. For a fully upgraded Type 12 in Meadows 2, the pricing is fair but not a distressed bargain. It offers strong rental yield potential (typically 5-6% net in this segment) and steady capital appreciation, but a rigorous technical inspection of the upgrades and MEP infrastructure is highly recommended before proceeding.

title: Exclusive Deal , Upgraded Interiors , Single Row
description:
SUNGATE REAL ESTATE BROKERS LLC is pleased to present this property located in The Lakes, Dubai.

Only Direct

ai_analysis.quality_context: The property is marketed as a 4-bedroom villa with a spacious 4,677 sqft layout, boasting upgraded interiors and a highly desirable 'Single Row' positioning, which typically commands a premium due to enhanced privacy and open views. However, there is a major geographical discrepancy: the metadata classifies the property in the ultra-luxury 'Emirates Hills' enclave, whereas the broker's description explicitly locates it in 'The Lakes'—a premium, yet distinct and lower-priced neighboring community.
risk_flags: Critical Location Discrepancy: Listed under 'Emirates Hills' but described as being in 'The Lakes'. These two areas have vastly different price points, prestige levels, and target demographics.

Misleading Pricing Comparison: The apparent 34% discount against the market median (1,892 AED/sqft vs. 2,861 AED/sqft) is highly misleading, as it compares a property in The Lakes against Emirates Hills market data.
Incomplete Listing Details: The description is truncated ('Only Direct...'), indicating poor listing quality control or an unverified pocket listing.
Potential Bait-and-Switch: The use of 'Emirates Hills' branding for a 'Lakes' property is a common tactic to artificially inflate search visibility and perceived value.
ai_analysis.investment_summary: From an investment perspective, this asset must be evaluated strictly as a property in 'The Lakes' rather than 'Emirates Hills'. At 1,892 AED/sqft for an upgraded, single-row 4-bedroom villa, the pricing is actually in line with, or slightly premium for, the upper tier of The Lakes market (e.g., Hattan or Deema sub-communities). Investors should completely discount the 'Emirates Hills' median comparison, conduct a physical inspection to verify the quality of the 'upgraded interiors', and underwrite the deal using historical transaction data specifically from The Lakes to determine true ROI and capital appreciation potential.

raw_area: Azizi Riviera 68, Azizi Riviera, Meydan One, Meydan, Dubai
description:
Azizi Riviera redefines modern waterfront living, seamlessly blending the charm of a coastal retreat with the energy of city life. Set against the backdrop of Dubai’s iconic skyline, this sophisticated development offers a lifestyle where elegance, comfort, and vibrancy coexist.

Surrounded by lush, landscaped surroundings, residents are immersed in a world of premium amenities—from indoor and outdoor play areas to exclusive retail boutiques and a curated selection of dining destinations. Every detail is designed to create a dynamic yet tranquil living environment.

Key Features of Azizi Riviera
Modern Living & Design

Azizi Riviera is crafted to deliver a sophisticated urban lifestyle, combining innovation with elegance:

Smart home technology for seamless control of lighting, temperature, and security
Biophilic architecture featuring integrated greenery, vertical gardens, and landscaped façades
Contemporary interiors with premium finishes, open-plan layouts, and floor-to-ceiling windows
Private balconies, with select units offering terraces, plunge pools, or jacuzzis

Unit Types: Studios, 1, 2, and 3-bedroom apartments—designed to suit singles, couples, and families

Resort-Style Amenities

Resort-style swimming pools with sun decks
Fully equipped gym, outdoor yoga areas & sports courts (tennis/padel)
Landscaped gardens, outdoor cinema, mini golf & family play areas
Retail boulevard with cafés, supermarkets & pharmacy
EV charging stations supporting sustainable living
Concierge services, 24/7 security & doorman assistance
Prime Location & Connectivity
Excellent access to major highways and key destinations including Downtown Dubai, Dubai Marina, Palm Jumeirah, and Mall of the Emirates
Family-friendly environment with nearby parks, schools, and healthcare facilities
Vibrant community living with retail, dining, and entertainment within the development
Investment Highlights.

For more details or to schedule a viewing, contact Patriot Pro Real Estate

description:
Secure immediate cash flow from day one. Perched on the 8th floor of the highly sought-after The Pulse Residence B2 in Dubai South, this beautifully maintained 639.91 sq. ft. 1-bedroom apartment is sold fully furnished and currently leased. This is the ultimate "set-and-forget" property for an investor wanting to instantly add a high-yield, income-generating asset to their portfolio without the hassle of a vacancy gap.
### Property Specifications
Type: 1-Bedroom Apartment
Location: Tower B2, The Pulse Residences, Dubai South
Floor: 8th Floor (High Floor)
Size: 639.91 sq. ft.
Parking: 1 Dedicated Covered Space
Furnishing: Fully Furnished (Premium modern furniture & appliances included)
Status: Leased / Generating Income
### Why This is a Top-Tier Investor Asset
Immediate ROI: No waiting for handovers or marketing for tenants. Income generation begins the exact moment ownership transfers.
Premium Furnishing Included: Fully fitted out with contemporary, tasteful furniture and high-quality appliances, drastically increasing the underlying value and long-term rental appreciation.
Elevated 8th Floor Positioning: Being on a high floor means the unit benefits from great privacy, minimal street-level disruption, and plenty of natural daylight via floor-to-ceiling windows.
Low-Maintenance Layout: An efficient square footprint featuring a spacious open-plan living/dining hall, private balcony, master bedroom with extensive built-in wardrobes, and a clean semi-open kitchen.
### The Pulse Community Perks
Lifestyle Assets: Access to large temperature-controlled swimming pools, premium health clubs, and fully equipped gyms.
Convenience Hub: Ground-floor retail promenade featuring major supermarkets, cafes, restaurants, laundry facilities, and pharmacies.
Security & Management: 24/7 dedicated lobby concierge, secure access-controlled elevators, and full CCTV surveillance.

- Exclusive
- Vacant on transfer

For more details please contact: Jamie Grimshaw
Email Address: jamie@luxuryinvestgroup.com
 
 
 
Dorra Bay is a 22 storey residential building which was proudly developed by Cayan Group with handover taking place in 2007. The location is super prime as it is located directly on the waterfront of Dubai Marina and is only a couple of minutes walk to the public beach at JBR. Sitting adjacent to the Address Beach Resort, it is within walking distance of some of the best restaurants in the whole of Dubai as well as being in close proximity to the world famous JBR walk and Dubai Marina Mall. Due to its positioning, there is easy access in and out of Dubai Marina via Sheikh Zayed Road.
 
The tower benefits from an abundance of amenities which include state of the art gymnasium, large swimming pool, BBQ area, on-site retails, a large kids outdoor play area and much more.

Spacious 1-Bedroom | Fully Furnished | High Floor | Stunning Golf & Canal Views

Discover elevated living in one of Dubai Sports City’s most prestigious residential towers. This exceptionally spacious 1-bedroom apartment offers a rare combination of size, comfort, and breathtaking views, making it an ideal home or investment opportunity.

Situated on a high floor, the apartment features expansive interiors with a well-designed layout, abundant natural light, and premium furnishings throughout. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame spectacular panoramic views of the lush golf course and tranquil canal, creating a serene setting above the city. The apartment has been thoughtfully upgraded and is fully furnished with quality appliances including a fridge,TV and microwave, making it completely move-in ready. Floor-to-ceiling windows frame spectacular panoramic views of the lush golf course and tranquil canal, creating a serene setting above the city.

Property Highlights:

Huge 1-bedroom apartment with generous living spaces
Fully furnished and move-in ready
Size-1164 sqft
High-floor unit with uninterrupted golf course and canal views
Bright open-plan living and dining area
Modern kitchen with quality fittings and appliances
Spacious bedroom with built-in wardrobes
Located in one of the premium towers in Dubai Sports City
Excellent amenities including pool, gym, dry Sauna,Steam Room,new Jacuzzi,24/7 security, and covered parking

Perfect for end-users seeking a refined lifestyle or investors looking for a high-demand property in a thriving community. Enjoy the convenience of nearby retail, dining, sports facilities, and easy access to major highways.

A rare opportunity to own a standout apartment in one of Dubai Sports City’s most sought-after addresses.

title: Eid Offer | Lowest | One Bed | Brand New | Ready
description:
Living in Arjan feels like stepping into a vibrant, blooming oasis designed for modern urban life. This particular 1-bedroom apartment captures that essence perfectly, offering an inviting space to call home without compromising on style or comfort. With 757 square feet of thoughtfully arranged living space, it presents a harmonious blend of functionality and elegance, ideal for those who appreciate both convenience and sophistication. The apartment’s semi-furnished layout provides a delightful foundation for personal expression. 

 A private balcony serves as your personal retreat, perfect for morning coffee or quiet evenings under the stars. The building features a stylish lobby that sets the tone for refined living, while the shared pool and spa offer perfect spots for relaxation. For fitness enthusiasts, the state-of-the-art gym and children’s play area cater to all ages, and the barbecue area provides a communal space for sharing meals with neighbors. Security ensures peace of mind around the clock. 

Arjan itself is a thriving community nestled within Dubailand, offering a peaceful yet dynamic lifestyle. Just minutes away lie the stunning Dubai Miracle Garden and Dubai Butterfly Garden, perfect for nature walks or photo opportunities. The area is well-connected, with easy access to Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road and Umm Suqeim Road, placing major attractions, schools, clinics, and entertainment hubs within comfortable reach. 

Nearby malls such as My City Centre Al Barsha provide everything from retail therapy to dining options, ensuring daily needs are met effortlessly. Priced at AED 999,900, this apartment represents a compelling opportunity for both residents and investors. The combination of strategic location, premium amenities, and modern design makes it a standout choice in Arjan. Don’t miss the chance to secure a piece of this vibrant community—schedule a viewing today and envision the life you’ll create here.

Location and Connectivity:

Afnan 4 is part of the Afnan District within Midtown by Deyaar, situated in Dubai Production City (IMPZ)  a well-established mixed-use community spanning 43 million square feet along Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road (E311). Residents enjoy direct access to City Centre Me'aisem, a community mall offering shopping, dining, and entertainment options including Magic Planet. The community also benefits from Mediclinic Me'aisem for healthcare needs, along with a variety of dining outlets, cafes, and nurseries within the neighbourhood.

The community is well-connected via Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road and Al Khail Road (E44), providing easy access to nearby areas including Dubai Sports City and Jumeirah Village Triangle. Public buses serve the area, and the broader Dubai Metro network is accessible by a short drive.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Saad Zuberi.

title: Double Master Bedroom | Twin Balcony | Motivated Seller
description:
Discover an exceptional opportunity to own a spacious off-plan resale apartment in Lana on the Park, one of Town Square’s most sought-after residential addresses. This thoughtfully designed 2-bedroom home offers the largest layout available, perfectly blending comfort, privacy, and contemporary living.

Featuring two master bedrooms, each with its own en-suite bathroom, this apartment is ideal for end-users and investors alike. The dual private balconies provide serene outdoor spaces to relax and enjoy community views, while the open-plan living and dining area enhances the sense of space and light throughout the home.

Whether you're looking for a modern lifestyle upgrade or a high-demand rental asset, this property stands out with its premium layout and prime positioning within the community.

Property Features
-Largest 2-bedroom layout in the building
-Two spacious master bedrooms with en-suite bathrooms
-Bright open-plan living and dining area
-Contemporary kitchen with high-quality finishes
-Two private balconies offering outdoor living space
-Floor-to-ceiling windows for natural light
-Built-in wardrobes in both bedrooms
-Dedicated parking space
- Direct main park access

Community Features 
-Lush green parks and landscaped open spaces
-Walking, jogging, and cycling tracks
-Community retail outlets, cafes, and restaurants
-Children’s play areas and splash parks
-Swimming pools and fully equipped gyms
-Skate park and sports courts
-Family-friendly environment with regular events
-Easy access to major road networks
-Close proximity to schools and healthcare facilities

This is a rare chance to secure a premium unit in a vibrant, fast-growing community. Reach out today for more details or to reserve this standout property.

Armada Tower 3 is situated in the lively JLT conveniently placed within close proximity of key landmarks in Dubai such as Dubai Marina, The Palm and JBR Beach. DAMAC Hills is one of Dubai’s most recognized master-planned residential communities, offering a blend of luxury living, green landscapes, and a family-oriented lifestyle. Each unit is designed to maximize space and functionality, featuring bright interiors, built-in wardrobes, and modern kitchens. The apartments feature large windows for natural light, stylish finishes, fitted kitchens, and generous living spaces. title: Investor Deal | Luxury 1BR Waterfront Living
description:
Presented by Betterhomes
, this elegant 1-bedroom apartment in Marina Views at Rashid Yachts & Marina offers a rare opportunity to own a premium waterfront residence

Spanning 742.38 sq.ft, the apartment is thoughtfully designed with contemporary interiors, spacious living areas, and floor-to-ceiling windows that maximize natural light and create a seamless connection to the vibrant marina surroundings. The modern layout combines comfort and sophistication, making it ideal for both investors and end users seeking long-term value in a prestigious community.

Marina Views forms part of the iconic Rashid Yachts & Marina master development, where Riviera-inspired elegance meets Dubai’s dynamic urban lifestyle. Set within the historic Port Rashid district, the community is designed around a world-class marina capable of accommodating luxury yachts, alongside beautifully landscaped promenades, fine dining, boutique retail, and exclusive leisure experiences.

Residents will enjoy a wide range of premium amenities including swimming pools, fitness facilities, waterfront relaxation areas, and easy access to Dubai’s key landmarks. Perfectly positioned, the development offers excellent connectivity with Downtown Dubai just 10 minutes away and Dubai International Airport reachable within 15 minutes.


Property Highlights:

1 Bedroom
1 Bathroom
BUA: 742.38 Sq.ft
Luxury Waterfront Community
Premium Amenities
80/20 Payment Plan

This brand new and fully furnished 1-bedroom apartment in Diamond Building, Al Satwa (Jumeirah Garden City) offers generous living space and excellent connectivity in the heart of Dubai. With a total area of 886.19 sq.ft, the apartment is ideal for professionals or families looking for comfort, convenience, and easy access to key business districts.

The apartment features a bright and spacious living and dining area, one well-sized bedroom with ample storage, a fully equipped kitchen, and quality furnishings throughout. Large windows allow plenty of natural light, creating a comfortable and welcoming living environment.

description:
Fully furnished and currently rented, this 2-bedroom apartment in Tenora presents an excellent investment opportunity with immediate rental income and strong long-term appreciation potential within one of Dubai’s fastest-growing master communities.

Located in the heart of Dubai South, the property benefits from ongoing infrastructure development and increasing demand driven by the expansion of Al Maktoum International Airport, Expo City Dubai, and the wider commercial and logistics hub surrounding the area. As the community continues to mature, Dubai South is expected to see significant capital growth, making this an ideal addition to any investment portfolio.
The apartment offers a practical open-plan layout with bright living spaces, modern finishes, floor-to-ceiling windows, and a fitted kitchen. The unit is fully furnished and well suited to both end users and long-term tenants.

developer_name: a podium and feature a stunning fa
description:
Betterhomes is delighted to offer you this luxurious One Bedroom Apartment for sale in prestigious Sparkle Tower 3, Dubai Marina. 

One of Dubai Marina's most iconic residential developments, Sparkle Towers is a twin-tower complex created in partnership with renowned Austrian crystal brand Swarovski and completed in 2020. The towers are connected by a podium and feature a stunning façade illuminated by over 1,700 lights and adorned with Swarovski crystal accents, creating a brilliant, jewel-like glow at night. 

Residents enjoy an impressive selection of amenities, including a fully equipped fitness center, spa, temperature-controlled swimming pools, separate saunas and Jacuzzis for men and women, and an exclusive residents' lounge. Ideally located along Marina Walk, Sparkle Towers offers easy access to the beach, Dubai Metro, and a variety of waterfront dining and leisure destinations. 

Property Features:
- Low Floor
- 800.73 Sq. Ft. 
- Ready to Move In
- Community View
- Fully Furnished and Equipped
- Swimming Pool & Gym
- Allotted Basement Parking Space
- Close to Restaurants, Shops, Mall
- Contact the Consultant for more information or to arrange a viewing. 

Finance is available on this property through Betterhomes Mortgage partners.

description:
Driven Properties is pleased to offer this elegant 1-bedroom apartment for sale in OST Tower 11, located in the highly sought-after community of Majan.

Property Features:

  * Brand-new high-rise development
  * Bright interiors with maximized natural light
  * Floor-to-ceiling windows
  * Spacious and modern layout
  * High-quality finishes throughout
  * Private terrace with community and pool views
  * Built-in wardrobes
  * Open-plan kitchen

About OST 11 Residences:

OST 11 Tower is a contemporary residential development in Majan, offering stylish urban living with thoughtfully designed spaces and refined finishes. The residences feature open layouts and bright interiors, creating a comfortable and modern lifestyle experience. Ideally situated in a peaceful yet connected area of Dubailand, the tower provides convenient access to major roads, retail outlets, and essential services.

Amenities:

  * Resort-style swimming pool with sun loungers
  * Fully equipped fitness center
  * 24/7 security and CCTV surveillance
  * Elegant lobby with high-speed elevators
  * Children’s play area
  * Landscaped outdoor spaces and BBQ area
  * Close to retail shops, cafés, and restaurants
  * Easy access to Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road (E311) and Al Ain Road

About the Community:

Majan is a rapidly growing residential destination within Dubailand, known for its peaceful atmosphere and excellent connectivity. Surrounded by greenery and everyday conveniences, the community offers a balanced lifestyle with modern residences, family-friendly surroundings, and seamless access to key destinations across Dubai, making it an attractive choice for both homeowners and investors.

- High-speed elevators
- Outdoor seating areas
- Circle Mall with retail, dining and Spinneys
- 30+ landscaped community parks

Location and Connectivity:

Belgravia Square is an Ellington Properties development nestled within Jumeirah Village Circle, one of Dubai's most sought-after family-friendly communities. Developed by Nakheel, JVC is home to over 30 landscaped parks, jogging and cycling tracks, sports courts, and a vibrant selection of cafes, restaurants, and supermarkets. Circle Mall, the community's main retail hub, places everyday conveniences within easy reach.

Strategically positioned between Al Khail Road and Sheikh Mohammed Bin Zayed Road, JVC offers seamless connectivity to Dubai Marina, Downtown Dubai, Dubai Media City, and Dubai Internet City. The building's location in District 14 places residents close to several reputable schools and healthcare facilities, making it an ideal home for professionals and families alike.

For more details or to arrange a viewing, please contact Hunter Steele Newman.

raw_area: Garden East Apartments A, Garden East Apartments, Green Community, Dubai Investment Park 1 (DIP 1), Dubai Investment Park (DIP), Dubai
description:
Apartment for sale in Garden East Apartments, Green Community
Hanson Properties is delighted to present this spacious 2-bedroom garden apartment in the prestigious Green Community.. Offering a rare combination of generous living space and direct access to landscaped gardens, this residence provides an ideal setting for family living in a tranquil community.
Spanning 1,927.49 sq. feet, this ground-level apartment is designed with functionality and comfort in mind. With its bright interiors, private garden outlook, and family-friendly layout, it is perfectly suited for homeowners and investors alike.
Property Highlights
• 2 Spacious Bedrooms – including a master suite with en-suite bathroom and built-in wardrobes
• Expansive Living & Dining Area – open-plan layout with large windows and natural light
• Private Garden Access – enjoy a lush green backdrop and outdoor lifestyle
• Balcony/Terrace Area – perfect for entertaining and relaxation
• Covered Parking – secure and easily accessible
• Family-Oriented Layout – spacious design providing comfort and convenience
• Green Community– renowned for its landscaped greenery, wide walkways, and peaceful atmosphere
The apartment features a bright and airy living space that seamlessly connects to the garden, creating a serene retreat for families. The master bedroom offers privacy and comfort, while the additional bedroom provides ample space for family or guests. With plenty of storage and a practical layout, this home is designed for modern living.
Green Community is one of Dubai’s most sought-after neighborhoods, celebrated for its lush surroundings, family-friendly facilities, and convenient location. Residents enjoy parks, community pools, retail outlets, and excellent connectivity to major roads and the rest of Dubai.
This property presents a rare opportunity to own a spacious 2-bedroom garden apartment in one of Dubai’s most desirable communities – combining indoor comfort with the beauty of outdoor living.
